_comment: TEMPLATE — copy this file for each new token launch. Fill in all fields.

_platform_notes.pumpfun: Zero creator cost. First buyer pays ~0.02 SOL. Graduates at ~$69k MC to PumpSwap. No creator allocation.
_platform_notes.raydium_cpmm: ~0.20 SOL pool creation + liquidity you seed. Full control, creator allocation possible. NOT YET IMPLEMENTED.
